div.p: This case-sensitive code system https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/CodeSystem/cs-nemsis-exam defines the following codes:

tr.td: Capillary Nail Bed Refill less than 2 seconds
Capillary Nail Bed Refill more than 4 seconds
State of emotional shock and stress, unspecified

description.value: Enumeration codes for the NEMSIS eExam physical examination section. Covers body region assessments and finding location qualifiers. NEMSIS 3.5.1.251001CP2.

display.value: Capillary Nail Bed Refill less than 2 seconds
Capillary Nail Bed Refill more than 4 seconds
State of emotional shock and stress, unspecified
